title: Easy Enchanter
description: A new kind of profession will please you, because now you can easily buy the desired enchanted book at a cheap price!
body:
From now on, you don't have to worry about the librarian begging him for rare magic books at a crazy price and with a rare chance. Now the enchanter will provide you with everything you need!
Now the enchantment table has become even more useful.
With the release of version 2.0, this mod has gained new enchantments! Now, among the books of enchantment, you will find not only the maximum level, but also the rest up to the first one!
![Enchanter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc26762d91cd2e5ba5353510e4de19b0bdd36ad3.jpeg)
